---
title: "ደ/ብርሃን ቅ/ሥላሴ ዳላስ ቴክሳስ"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    fig-width: 10
    fig-asp: 0.3
brand:
  light: brand/light.yml
  dark: brand/dark.yml
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{=html}
<head>
      <style>
        nav.navbar.navbar-expand-md.slim {
          display: none;
        }
      </style>
    </head>
```


```{=html}
<!-- <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap/5.3.0/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet"> -->
<link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

.info-btn {
  /* background: none;  <-- REMOVE OR COMMENT OUT THIS LINE */
 /* background-color: #ffffff;  Add this line to make the outer circle white */
  border: none;
  /*color: #6c757d;  This is the color of the 'i' icon and its inner circle */
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  padding: 0.5rem; /* This padding creates the size of the white circle */
  border-radius: 40%;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: fixed;
  top: 15px;
  right: 20px;
  z-index: 1050;
  
  background-color: #7e8f9e;
  border: none;
  color: #292a33;
}

.info-btn:hover {
    background-color: #e9ecef;
    color: #495057;
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.info-btn .fas { /* Target the Font Awesome icon directly */
  /* vertical-align: middle; */ /* Try this first */
  /* If 'middle' isn't enough, you might need a slight adjustment */
  vertical-align: -3px;  /* Example: push down by 2 pixels */
}
.modal-header {
    background-color: #f8f9fa;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
}

.modal-title {
    color: #2c3e50;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.section-title {
    color: #495057;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.citation-text {
    background-color: #f8f9fa;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    border-left: 4px solid #007bff;
    font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}
</style>

<!-- Info Button -->
<button id="infoBtn" class="info-btn" type="button" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#infoModal" title="About This Dashboard">
    <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i>
</button>

<!-- Info Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="infoModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="infoModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title" id="infoModalLabel">
                    <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
                    About This Dashboard
                </h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-calendar-alt me-2"></i>Data Period
                </div>
                <p class="mb-3">Weekly update</p>
                
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-database me-2"></i>Data Source
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2">Data originally from:</p>
                <p class="mb-2">
                    The core of its functionality relies on the Google YouTube Data API and Google YouTube Analytics API.
                    <br>
                    <a href="https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>
                        https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3
                    </a>
                </p>
                <p class="mb-3">
                    Accessed via: 
                    <a href="https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>
                        Google YouTube Data API
                    </a>
                </p>
                
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-quote-left me-2"></i>Citation
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2">To cite this dashboard:</p>
                <div class="citation-text">
                    Zeleke,Y.(2026). Debre Berhan Holy Trinity EOTC Dallas-TX Dashboard [github.io]. 
                    <a href="https://github.com/yihun/eotc-youtube-channels" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        https://github.com/yihun/eotc-youtube-channels
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <div class="section-title mt-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-user-circle me-2"></i>Credits
                </div>
                <p class="mb-0">
                    <strong>Designed by:</strong> Yihun Zeleke, 2026
                </p>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">
                    <i class="fas fa-times me-2"></i>Close
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap/5.3.0/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
```


```{r}
#| context: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| inlcude: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
library(showtext)
library(ggtext)
library(echarts4r)
library(stringr)
library(plotly)
library(htmltools)
source(here::here("scripts/data_cleaning_001.R"))
source(here::here("scripts/theme_and_function.R"))

font_add_google("Libre Franklin", "franklin")
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Libre Fraklin"))
dark_gregy = "#1e2a45"

```
## Row - Plots: Themes {height="50%"}

### Column - Monthly View Trends

```{r}
#| label: videos-monthly-trends
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 8

videos <- videos |>
  mutate(month = month(published_at, label = TRUE), year = year(published_at)) |> 
  mutate(
    hour_of_day = hour(published_at),
    day_of_week = wday(published_at, label = TRUE, abbr = FALSE),
    month = month(published_at, label = TRUE)
  )

trnd_plot1 <- videos %>%
  group_by(hour_of_day) %>%
  summarise(avg_views = mean(views, na.rm = TRUE), Count = n()) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(
    x = factor(hour_of_day),
    y = avg_views,
    fill = avg_views,
    text = paste(
      'Hours of the Day:',
      hour_of_day,
      "\nVideos published:",
      Count,
      "\nAvg. Views: ",
      label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())(avg_views)
    )
  )) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#87b6ec", high = "#1178b7") +
  labs(
    title = "Average Views by Hour of Publish (UTC)",
    y = "Avg. Views by Hr",
    x = "Hrs"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
  ) +
  guides(fill = "none")+
  custom_theme()

ggplotly(trnd_plot1, tooltip = "text") |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(size = 12)
    ),
    legend = list(font = list(size = 12))
  )

```


### Column - Comment Sentiment: Most Popular Words

```{r}

#| label: sentiment-wordcloud
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 8
wk_colors <- c(
  "Sunday"    = "#d9edf3",
  "Monday"    = "#c4e1ed",
  "Tuesday"   = "#aed5e7",
  "Wednesday" = "#49a9dd",
  "Thursday"  = "#6eb9df",
  "Friday"    = "#99c9e1",
  "Saturday"  = "#b7d1e6"
)


trnd_plot2 <- videos |> 
  group_by(day_of_week) |> 
  summarise(avg_views = mean(views, na.rm = TRUE), Count = n()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(
    x = factor(day_of_week),
    y = avg_views,
    fill = day_of_week,
    text = paste(
      'Day of the Week:',
      day_of_week,
      "\nVideos published:",
      Count,
      "\nAvg. Views: ",
      label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())(avg_views)
    )
  )) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wk_colors)+
  coord_flip()+
  labs(
    title = "Average Views by Day of the Week",
    y = "Avg. views by day",
    x = "Day"
  ) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  custom_theme()

ggplotly(trnd_plot2, tooltip = "text") |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(size = 12)
    ),
    legend = list(font = list(size = 12))
  )

```

## Row - charts {height="100%"}

### Column - Total Views by Year {height="100%", scrolling="true"}

```{r}
#| label: views-year-chart
#| fig-height: 8
#| fig-width: 10
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| out-width: "100%"

month_order <- c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun",
                 "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec")

videos_calendar <- videos |>
  select(published_at, views) |> 
  mutate(published_at = as.Date(published_at)) |> 
  mutate(date = format(published_at , "%m-%d-%Y")) |> 
  mutate(year = format(published_at, "%Y")) |> 
  mutate(month = month(published_at, label = TRUE), .keep = "unused") |> 
  mutate(
    date = mdy(date),                     
    date = format(date, "%Y-%m-%d") ) |> 
   mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    month = factor(format(date, "%b"), levels = month_order),
    week_of_month = ceiling(day(date) / 7),
    weekday = wday(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE, week_start = 1)
  )
  
trnd_plot2 <- videos_calendar |> 
  ggplot( aes(x = week_of_month, y = weekday, fill = views , 
    text = paste("Week of Month:" , week_of_month,
    "\nWeek Day:", weekday,
    "\nView:", views,
    "\nYear:", year))) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ month, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#af97c2ff", high = "#4e215fff",
                        trans = "log10",
                        labels = scales::comma,
                        name = "Views") +
  labs(
    title = "Daily Views Heatmap",
    x = "Week of Month",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  )

# ggplotly(trnd_plot2,  tooltip = list("text")) |>
#   config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
#   layout(
#     xaxis = list(
#       tickfont = list(size = 12)
#     ),
#     legend = list(font = list(size = 12))
#   )

# Layout: 4 rows x 3 cols (fill vertically)
n_col <- 3
n_row <- 4
month_positions <- data.frame(
  month = month_order,
  col   = rep(1:n_col, each = n_row),
  row   = rep(1:n_row, times = n_col)
)

# Merge positions into your data
plot_data <- videos_calendar |>
  left_join(month_positions, by = "month")

# Build subplot grid
plots <- list()

for (i in seq_along(month_order)) {
  m <- month_order[i]
  df_m <- plot_data |> filter(month == m)
  
  plots[[i]] <- plot_ly(
    data = df_m,
    x = ~week_of_month,
    y = ~weekday,
    z = ~log10(views + 1),
    type = "heatmap",
    colorscale = list(
      c(0, "#b261f4ff"),
      c(1, "#490363ff")
    ),
    showscale = FALSE,
    text = ~paste("Week of Month:", week_of_month,
                  "<br>Week Day:", weekday,
                  "<br>Views:", scales::comma(views),
                  "<br>Year:", year),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |>
    layout(
      annotations = list(
        list(text = m, 
             x = 0.5, y = 1.0,
             xref = "paper", 
             yref = "paper",
             xanchor = "center",
             yanchor   = "bottom",
             showarrow = FALSE, font = list(size = 13, color = "white"))
      ),
      xaxis = list(showticklabels = FALSE, showgrid = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE)
    )
}

# Combine into subplot (4 rows x 3 cols, vertical fill)
subplot(plots, nrows = n_row, shareX = FALSE, shareY = FALSE, margin = 0.05) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Daily Views Heatmap", x = 0.5),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    margin = list(l = 10, r = 10, t = 50, b = 10),
    # paper_bgcolor= "#4E4E4E",   # outer background (around the plot)
    plot_bgcolor  = "#49444dff",    # inner background (behind the tiles)
    paper_bgcolor = "#1e2a45",
    font = list(
      family = "Georgia",
      color = "#a8a5aaff"
    )
  )
```
